behavior_summary: Implements the mirror object's response to a 'U8P_MIR::look' (examine) action. When a player/actor looks at the mirror, the script causes the item to emit the literal text "mirror " directed at the invoking process.
Behavior is local to the item: it prepares a call context, invokes Item::bark to present the string to the viewer, cleans up temporaries, and then suspends/returns.
No persistent global flags are read or written by this routine in the extracted snippet; the effect is a transient UI/message produced for the caller.
notable_control_flow: Entry on the 'U8P_MIR::look' event (Event 0) for the mirror object.
Local initialization and a small sequence of push/indirect pushes to prepare arguments, including a pointer to the literal string "mirror ".
Call to external routine Item::bark to produce the visible/audible message for the invoking process.
Post-call cleanup (free/stack adjust), push of the bark return value, an 'implies' operation involving that return, a pop of a temp, then suspend/return.
open_questions: Exact formal parameter ordering and meanings for Item::bark in this engine (which pushed values correspond to which Item::bark parameter).
Precise semantics of the 'implies' instruction in this context (how the bark return influences control flow or the calling process).
Purpose and effect of the earlier 'set info' / 'process exclude' opcodes observed around the call — are they setting metadata on the item or configuring processing exclusion for this event?
Role of the initialized local (init_local_00) beyond stack/frame setup — any later use outside the snippet is not shown.

main_function.name: U8P_MIR::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_MIR::look' verb for the mirror: produce the short description/message "mirror " directed at the invoking process and then return/suspend.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_MIR::look) — invoked when an actor/player examines/looks at the mirror object

function_map.name: U8P_MIR::look
function_map.role: Event handler for the mirror object's 'U8P_MIR::look' (examine) action; orchestrates message display via Item::bark.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item service used to make an item produce a short text/message directed at a process/player.

external_calls.purpose: Deliver the literal string "mirror " (the mirror's short description/bark) to the invoking process/player; primary visible effect of the handler.
